description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban streetwear, featuring a loose short-sleeve shirt adorned with gold chains and a large graphic on the back. He wears baggy pants that are cropped below the knee, paired with low-top sneakers. His forearms are covered in tattoos, and he sports fingerless gloves on both hands. The figure's face is partially obscured by a patterned bandana mask, and his hair is styled in a high ponytail. The overall appearance is accessorized with multiple gold necklaces, giving a distinct hip-hop or street fashion vibe.
description: Urban male pedestrian in streetwear with a bandana mask, gold chains, tattoos, and a high ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bandana mask, gold chains, tattoos, and the detailed shirt design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, arm tattoos, and the profile of the bandana mask.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large graphic on the back of the shirt and the ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm tattoos, gloves, and side profile of the face covering.
attribute_clothing_type: loose short-sleeve shirt with graphic, baggy cropped pants, fingerless gloves, and multiple gold necklaces
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied in a high ponytail
